dashboard.title: Operator Command Center
dashboard.subtitle: Chat-first AI operations across local runtimes, cloud providers, builds, and automation.
ai_providers.title: Cloud AI Providers
ai_providers.optional_hint: Optional — for chat and completions. Skip if using only on-device models.
ai_providers.configure_one: Configure only the providers you need. Leave others collapsed.
api.provider_validation_has_failures: Some providers are not configured or unreachable. Configure API keys and check connectivity, or skip if using only on-device models.
ai_providers.floating_chat_message_place: Ask a question or send an audio message.
ai_providers.chat_message_aria: Chat message input. Type your question or prompt for the AI.
ai_providers.floating_chat_speech_mime_a: Speech MIME type used for transcription
ai_providers.floating_chat_speech_group_: Either provide a text message, or provide both MIME type and base64 audio data.
ai_providers.floating_chat_request_tts_a: Enable text-to-speech output for the chat response
ai_providers.floating_chat_tts_voice_ari: Optional voice name for TTS output
ai_providers.floating_chat_aria: Open or focus the AI operator workspace
ai_providers.floating_chat_form_aria: AI chat form — select a provider and model, then send a message
ai_providers.floating_chat_hint: Use the floating chat button (bottom-right) to test configured providers.
ai_providers.secure_storage_hint: Set VERTU_ENCRYPTION_KEY before saving provider credentials.
ai_providers.credential_reentry_hint: Stored credential cannot be decrypted. Re-enter the provider key and save it again.
auth.required_message: This control-plane route requires a valid Vertu auth token.
auth.token_hint: Provide a valid token via Authorization: Bearer <token>, X-API-Key, the {cookieName} cookie, or the token query parameter for SSE requests.

model_mgmt.title: Model Management

model_search.label: Search HuggingFace models
model_search.idle: Search HuggingFace Hub to discover models.

model_search.no_results: No models found. Try a different search term.
model_search.query_required: Enter a search term to find models.
app_build.title: App Build
app_build.subtitle: Build Android, iOS, and desktop artifacts from one native matrix.
app_build.platform_hint: Use Android and iOS targets for native mobile packages, or Desktop to compile the control-plane binaries.
app_build.platform_android_desc: Local Android package build with the bundled native toolchain.
app_build.platform_ios_desc: Native iOS build orchestration for simulator and device-ready artifacts.
app_build.platform_desktop_desc: Standalone desktop control-plane binaries for Linux, macOS, and Windows.
app_build.desktop_hint: Desktop builds compile the control-plane into standalone binaries for Linux, macOS, and Windows.
app_build.failure_app_build_unsupported_: The requested build platform is not supported.
The requested build type is not supported.
app_build.failure_app_build_android_java: Java runtime is required to build the Android app on this host.
app_build.failure_app_build_desktop_bun_: Bun runtime is required to build the desktop app on this host.
app_build.failure_app_build_desktop_vari: The requested desktop build variant is not supported on this host.
app_build.failure_app_build_ios_mac_only: iOS builds can only run on macOS hosts.
app_build.failure_app_build_ios_tooling_: Xcode build tooling is required to build the iOS app on this host.
app_build.failure_app_build_ios_scheme_m: No shared iOS app scheme is available for the current project.
app_build.failure_app_build_ios_scheme_n: The requested iOS app scheme is not available.
app_build.failure_app_build_output_dir_i: The requested build output directory is invalid or unavailable.
app_build.failure_app_build_script_missi: The canonical build script for the selected platform is missing.
app_build.failure_app_build_execution_fa: The app build could not be started or completed on this host.
app_build.failure_ios_platform_support_m: The required iOS simulator or device platform assets are not installed.
app_build.failure_ios_required_destinati: No eligible iOS simulator or device destination is currently available.
app_build.failure_ios_showdestinations_f: Xcode could not enumerate iOS build destinations for the selected scheme.
ucp.title: UCP Commerce Discovery
ucp.subtitle: Discover UCP business capabilities.
ucp.url_aria: Business server URL for UCP discovery
flow_engine.title: Flow Engine
flow_engine.subtitle: Maestro-compatible YAML · Desktop RPA · Android Phone + iPhone controls
flow_engine.shared_instruction: Paste YAML below, then use the buttons to validate or run.
flow_engine.paste_yaml_placeholder:
appId: com.example.app
---
- launchApp
- tapOn: 'Login'
- inputText: 'hello@vertu.com'
- assertVisible: 'Welcome'
flow_engine.yaml_aria: YAML flow definition. Paste Maestro-compatible automation steps.
flow_engine.execution_policy_hint: Tune retries and timeout for the runtime you are automating.
flow_engine.max_attempts_hint: Maximum retries per command; keep this small for deterministic runs.
flow_engine.command_timeout_hint: Maximum per-command runtime before forcing a retry/failure.
flow_engine.target_hint: Choose the runtime that should execute the YAML flow so validation, capabilities, and retries stay platform-correct.
flow_engine.target_android_desc: ADB-driven mobile automation with taps, typing, swipes, screenshots, and app launch control.
flow_engine.target_ios_desc: XCUITest-backed simulator automation for iPhone flows, assertions, and capture steps.
flow_engine.target_osx_desc: Run desktop RPA steps directly on the local macOS host.
flow_engine.target_windows_desc: Run desktop RPA steps directly on a Windows host.
flow_engine.target_linux_desc: Run desktop RPA steps directly on a Linux host.
layout.trigger_flow_confirm: Execute the flow in the editor? This will run automation on your device.
layout.error_network: Network error. Please check your connection.
layout.error_timeout: Request timed out. Please try again.
layout.meta_description: Vertu Edge — Concierge-grade mobile and desktop AI automation control plane.

api.key_required: Provider key is required for this provider.
validation.model_ref_invalid: Model reference must be owner/repo or a valid URL.
validation.chat_message_or_speech_requir: Provide a message, or a full speech input payload.
validation.chat_speech_input_pair_requir: Provide both speech MIME type and base64 data together.
validation.chat_speech_data_invalid: Speech payload must be valid base64.
validation.chat_tts_output_format_requir: Select a TTS output format when TTS is enabled.
validation.app_build_platform: Platform is required (android, ios, or desktop).
api.model_selection_key_required: Save an API key to load models for this provider.
api.chat_missing_required_fields: Chat request is missing required message or speech input fields.
api.idle_providers_validation: Click Validate to check provider status.

api.idle_model_pull: Enter a model reference and click Pull to start.
api.idle_app_build: Configure options and click Generate build.

ai_workflow.capability_reason_probe_fail: Local models were detected, but capability probing failed.
Local models were detected, but capability probing failed. Remote fallback is available.
ai_workflow.capability_reason_local_miss: Installed local models do not declare support for this workflow mode.
Installed local models do not declare support for this workflow mode. Remote fallback is available.
ai_workflow.capability_reason_no_local_o: No local model declared support for this workflow mode and no remote fallback key is configured.
ai_workflow.message_placeholder: Describe what you want to create...
validation.ai_workflow_message_required: Enter a prompt for the workflow.
validation.ai_workflow_steps_range: Steps must be an integer between 1 and 100.
api.chat_route_retired: This route has been retired. Use /api/ai/workflows/run.
ai_workflow.mode_hint_chat: Use chat mode for fast local-first prompting and model checks.
ai_workflow.mode_hint_typography: Shape typography direction, hierarchy, pairings, and tone for a specific audience.
ai_workflow.mode_hint_presentation: Generate slide structure, narrative beats, and presenter-ready framing.
ai_workflow.mode_hint_social: Draft platform-specific hooks, threads, captions, and posting structure.
ai_workflow.mode_hint_image: Generate image prompts and artifacts with local-first rendering plus remote fallback when needed.
ai_workflow.image_steps_hint: Leave blank to use the provider default.
ai_workflow.image_seed_hint: Leave blank for a non-deterministic seed.
dashboard.summary_alert: Start by configuring the local runtime, then add optional cloud providers, generate app artifacts, and run device automation from one control surface.
dashboard.build_host_macos_desc: This host can generate Android and iOS artifacts directly.
dashboard.build_host_cross_platform_desc: Run Android, iOS, and desktop builds from one operator build matrix when the native toolchains are available on this host.
dashboard.section_runtime_desc: Set the model source, pull required models, and configure optional AI providers before running automation.
dashboard.section_build_desc: Generate Android, iOS, and Desktop artifacts from the canonical build pipeline and monitor deterministic status output.
device_readiness.title: Native device readiness
device_readiness.subtitle: Shows whether this host can run the full Android + iOS device AI protocol and whether fresh build artifacts are available.
device_readiness.summary_ready: All required native device protocol prerequisites are satisfied.
device_readiness.summary_blocked: The native device protocol is active, but required host prerequisites are missing.
device_readiness.summary_skipped: The native device protocol is not active on this host unless explicitly requested.
device_readiness.summary_delegated: iOS execution is delegated away from this host; the local native device gate is inactive.
device_readiness.build_failure_ios_platf: Provision the required iOS simulator or device assets before building.
device_readiness.build_failure_ios_requi: Boot or connect an eligible iOS simulator or device before building.
device_readiness.build_failure_ios_showd: Xcode could not enumerate iOS build destinations for the selected scheme.
dashboard.section_automation_desc: Validate or run device flows only after runtime and build prerequisites are in place.
dashboard.section_system_desc: Adjust preferences and discover UCP capabilities without leaving the main operator dashboard.
models.delete_confirm: Remove this model from the inventory?
models.no_models: No models registered. Pull a model to get started.
models.disk_space_error: Insufficient disk space to pull this model.
flows.name: Flow Name
flows.no_saved: No saved flows yet. Create one from the editor or use a template.
flow.target_hint_mobile: Full automation support: tap, scroll, input, assert, screenshot, swipe, and more.
flow.target_hint_desktop: Desktop targets support limited commands: launchApp, screenshot, clipboard. Tap, scroll, input, and assert commands are not available.
ai_workflow.mode_hint_flow_generation: Generate Maestro YAML automation flows from natural language
ai_workflow.flow_gen_hint: Describe the mobile automation you want to perform
